current_task: Arabic/English i18n fully implemented. All page text, navbar, banner, footer, mega menu translated. RTL layout supported.

last_change.summary: Full i18n with next-intl (en/ar), mega menu dropdowns, banner slider, offer cards with overlaid text, locale-aware images, RTL support.

completed: Project scaffold (Next.js 16.1.6, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui, TypeScript)
Docs rewritten for du.ae website replica
Design system: typography scale, color tokens, du_primary font
TopBar with Personal/Business tabs, search, language switcher
NavBar with mega menu dropdowns (5 menus with full content)
NavBar color inversion on dropdown active
Click outside to close dropdown
Banner slider with auto-rotate, progress bar, tab navigation
Banner links to external du.ae pages
Product cards with links to shop.du.ae
Offer cards with overlaid translatable text and gradient buttons
Esaad/Fazaa cards with 2-column layout and translatable text
Footer with real links (shop, social, app stores)
i18n: next-intl setup with en/ar locales
i18n: [locale] route segment with RTL support for Arabic
i18n: All page text translated (banner, shop, offers, packages, flexi, app, EID, cyber, help, footer)
i18n: Mega menu items and section titles translated
i18n: Locale-aware images (banner, app advert, EID, cyber safety)
i18n: CardSlider RTL scroll support
i18n: Language switcher in TopBar and mobile menu
i18n: Logical CSS properties (text-start) for RTL alignment
next: Polish RTL layout, remaining image swaps for Arabic, deploy to Vercel

notes.i18n: next-intl with messages/en.json and messages/ar.json. Middleware handles locale routing.
notes.images: Arabic image variants use -ar suffix (e.g. Mobile-ar.png, EID-ar.png)
